---
title: "Hi, I'm Egor 👋"
---

Welcome to my portfolio. I'm a data science student passionate about 
building things that work — and understanding why they do.

## Featured Visualization

Below is an interactive demo built with Shiny for Python, 
demonstrating OOP-based data generation and charting. TEEEEEEST


<iframe 
  src="https://connect.posit.cloud/greencurve/content/019d776c-e746-a5c0-abe0-459f8c960d27"
  width="100%" 
  height="600px" 
  frameborder="0">
</iframe>
